creator: george@m5p.com
text: I am regularly running my desktop machine with SCHED_4BSD and dnetc, and doing lots of firefox browsing, mail reading, and watching video with mplayer.  In a few days, I will shift to a SCHED_ULE kernel to see if there is any observable difference in this interactive use case for me.  I don't expect to observe much, but we will see.
